india_trends.title: Bitcoin price today: Token surpasses $81,000 after US Senate committee advances crypto regulation bill; Ether, XRP rally
india_trends.summary: The Senate Banking Committee advanced the Clarity Act, which would establish the Commodity Futures Trading Commission as the primary regulator for large parts of the crypto industry while the Securities and Exchange Commission would retain authority to oversee digital securities.

india_trends.title: Why India's new hybrid gold products may not be the right investment fit
india_trends.summary: India now has new digital gold products that also allow for physical deliveries. On paper, they promise real-time priced high-purity gold without the hassle of storage. But the jury is still out on whether these products meet investors' real needs.

india_trends.title: BoB looks to sell Rs 2,700 crore of NPAs; taps ARCs, NBFCs
india_trends.summary: Bank of Baroda is selling a ₹2,776 crore portfolio of 41 stressed loans, including nine declared fraud accounts like Ushdev International and Nirmal Lifestyle. The sale, conducted on a cash basis with assets transferred "as is where is, without recourse," aims to clean the bank's books.

india_trends.title: AI reset erases nearly half of IT majors’ value
india_trends.summary: India's top software exporters are projected to lose $200 billion in market value from their peaks due to disruptive AI technology.
